name: rule options: detector subprocess receives --options <json> argument with the resolved options object (per E-2 final clause + §2.2 detector contract)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule g-x-001 --in "$PWD/file.js" --options '{"max":5}' --trace-args 2>out.txt && grep -E 'options \{"max":5\}' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
